mapper.select: SELECT id, fid, bill_no, document_status, bill_date, creator_id, create_date, modifier_id, modify_date, auditor, audit_date, customer_short_name FROM sale_change_bill WHERE fid = #{fid}

SELECT id, fid, bill_no, document_status, bill_date, creator_id, create_date, modifier_id, modify_date, auditor, audit_date, customer_short_name FROM sale_change_bill WHERE fid = #{fid}
LIMIT 1

SELECT b.id, b.fid, b.bill_no, b.document_status, b.bill_date, cu.user_name AS creator_id, b.create_date, mu.user_name AS modifier_id, b.modify_date, au.user_name AS auditor, b.audit_date,
b.customer_short_name FROM sale_change_bill b LEFT JOIN sys_user cu ON b.creator_id = cu.k3_key LEFT JOIN sys_user mu ON b.modifier_id = mu.k3_key LEFT JOIN sys_user au ON b.auditor = au.k3_key WHERE b.id = #{id};
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sale_change_bill ( fid, bill_no, document_status, bill_date, creator_id, create_date, modifier_id, modify_date, auditor, audit_date, customer_short_name, create_time ) VALUES ( #{fid}, #{billNo}, #{documentStatus}, #{billDate}, #{creatorId}, #{createDate}, #{modifierId}, #{modifyDate}, #{auditor}, #{auditDate}, #{customerShortName}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO sale_change_bill ( fid, bill_no, document_status, bill_date, creator_id, create_date, modifier_id, modify_date, auditor, audit_date, customer_short_name, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.fid}, #{item.billNo}, #{item.documentStatus}, #{item.billDate}, #{item.creatorId}, #{item.createDate}, #{item.modifierId}, #{item.modifyDate}, #{item.auditor}, #{item.auditDate}, #{item.customerShortName}, NOW(), NOW() )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE bill_no = VALUES(bill_no), document_status = VALUES(document_status), bill_date = VALUES(bill_date), modifier_id = VALUES(modifier_id), modify_date = VALUES(modify_date), auditor = VALUES(auditor), audit_date = VALUES(audit_date), customer_short_name = VALUES(customer_short_name)
